claim_scope: Adnominal ge3 after adjectives, possessors, relative clauses, and nominal complements; restricted bare modifiers; interpretive contrast between bare and ge3 modifiers; referential headless modifier-ge3 nominals; distinction from sentence-final ge3.
important_limit: The chapter advances a particular indexical and empty-noun analysis. Surface distributions and examples may be used, but the parser must not import a silent noun, a single unified ge3 analysis, or unrestricted modifier productivity.

citation: Chan, Angel, Stephen Matthews, and Virginia Yip. 2011. The Acquisition of Relative Clauses in Cantonese and Mandarin. In E. Kidd (ed.), The Acquisition of Relative Clauses: Processing, Typology and Function, 197-225. John Benjamins.
publication_type: peer-reviewed book chapter
verified_locator: printed pp. 198-200 and 219-222; examples 1-2
claim_scope: Prenominal Cantonese relative clauses; classifier relatives and ge3 relatives; ge3 as an overt link between modifying clause and head noun; internally headed and noun-modifying-construction analyses as live alternatives.
important_limit: The chapter reviews competing processing and syntactic analyses. Its examples establish overt construction types, not a mandatory filler-gap derivation or the runtime’s object-gap heuristic.

citation: Chan, Angel, Wenchun Yang, Franklin Chang, and Evan Kidd. 2018. Four-year-old Cantonese-speaking children’s online processing of relative clauses: A permutation analysis. Journal of Child Language 45(1): 174-203.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article
verified_locator: publisher abstract and article metadata; pp. 174-203
claim_scope: Classifier and ge3 relative clauses as distinct Cantonese constructions with different frequencies, syntactic analyses, and processing profiles.
important_limit: A child-processing experiment does not by itself establish adult productivity, all relative-clause subtypes, or one correct syntactic theory. Use it to preserve the constructional distinction.

citation: Winterstein, Grégoire, David Vergnaud, Jérémie Lupien, Samuel Laperle, Hannah Yu, Christopher Davis, and Zoe Pei Sui Luk. 2023. An empirical, corpus-based, approach to Cantonese nominal expressions. Proceedings of PACLIC 37, 436-445.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference paper
verified_locator: pp. 437-441; section 2.1.2, example 2, Tables 1 and 3
claim_scope: Corpus-based inventory of Cantonese nominal expressions; di1 as a plural classifier in CL-N and NUM-CL-N patterns; compatibility with jat1; positional and information-structural interpretation boundaries.
important_limit: The corpus and annotations do not make di1 an English-style plural morpheme or assign a fixed some/the/these translation. The authors’ semantic analysis is not a parser ontology.

citation: Tang, Jason. 2024. Guide to Cantonese Grammar. Version dated 22 January 2024.
publication_type: author-produced descriptive learner grammar; openly available full text; not peer reviewed
verified_locator: pp. 34-39; sections on approximation, dates, deictic time periods, duration, and telling time
claim_scope: Exact contemporary Cantonese approximation forms with preposed 大約/差唔多 and postposed 咁上下/左右; exact examples 一公斤咁上下 and 三日左右; dates, duration contrasts, deictic time forms, and conventional 個字 units.
important_limit: The author explicitly presents this as a learner guide rather than a linguistic analysis. Exact examples attest marker order and pedagogical contrasts, not productivity, exhaustive lexical selection, syntactic category, corpus frequency, the runtime post-classifier 度 marker, or universal judgments.

citation: Wong, Lai-yin. 2002. The Morphology, Syntax, and Semantics of Adverbs in Cantonese. MPhil thesis, The University of Hong Kong.
publication_type: university MPhil thesis; official institutional-repository full text
verified_locator: PDF pp. 25-26 (printed pp. 18-19), section distinguishing time words from adverbs; related distributional discussion
claim_scope: Time words as nouns rather than a lexical adverb subclass; their ability to function as subject, modifier, object, or adverbial; compatibility with prepositions; distinction between lexical category and adverbial function.
important_limit: The thesis adopts a particular formal classification and does not provide a complete inventory of time nouns, classifier selection, temporal-clause types, or learner-facing parser nodes. Category analysis should not be converted into hidden structure.

citation: Yip, Ka-Fai. 2024. Two Types of Temporal Adverbial Clauses in Cantonese. In Proceedings of the 39th West Coast Conference on Formal Linguistics, ed. Robert Autry et al., 687-694. Cascadilla Proceedings Project.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official publisher full text
verified_locator: pp. 687-690, especially examples (3)-(4) and section 2 on hai- and dong-temporal adverbial clauses
claim_scope: Two overt Cantonese temporal-adverbial-clause types: 喺-headed clauses requiring a time head such as 嗰陣(時)/時候, and 當-headed clauses whose head time NP may be omitted; distinct internal and attachment properties.
important_limit: The operator-movement and attachment analysis is theory-specific. The paper establishes overt temporal-clause subtypes and contrasts, not that every initial time expression is a subordinate clause or that the runtime’s broad TemporalClause node is valid.

citation: Kataoka, Shin (片岡新). 2018. 從早期和現代語料看粵語進行體標記“緊”在複句中的功能. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):133-141.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official journal full text
verified_locator: pp. 133-136, especially examples (2)-(7), and corpus counts on pp. 135-136
claim_scope: Postverbal V緊 as progressive; contrast between 緊 and continuous 住; attested telic/motion, state-like, and extended-process uses; discourse/backgrounding use in complex sentences.
important_limit: The article focuses on historical and discourse functions of 緊. Its examples show distribution beyond an action-verb list but do not establish unrestricted lexical productivity or the parser’s exact directional and question templates.

citation: Fan, Xiaolei (范曉蕾). 2024. 香港粵語“有 VP”的時體意義——兼論普通話的“沒”. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 103(1):1-30. DOI: 10.29499/CrCL.202401_103(1).00012.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official journal full text
verified_locator: pp. 4-9, especially examples (3)-(9), Table 1, and discussion of V過, V緊, and V住
claim_scope: Aspectual contrasts among 過, 喺度, 住, 緊, and 咗; V過 as experiential/event-type predication; V緊 as dynamic progressive; V住 as continuous/static and favored in certain subordinate or accompanying-action VPs; 有+V過 distribution.
important_limit: The paper advances a specific stative/dynamic and nominalization analysis centered on auxiliary 有. Those theoretical classifications are not adopted wholesale, and its judgments do not license free V住/V緊 substitution or every 有+aspect combination.

citation: Matthews, Stephen and Virginia Yip. 2011. Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar, 2nd ed. Multimedia supplement, Chapter 11: Aspect and verbal particles. Chinese University of Hong Kong.
publication_type: scholarly reference-grammar multimedia supplement hosted by the authors’ university
verified_locator: CUHK multimedia supplement, Chapter 8 sections 8.4.2 and 8.5.1-8.5.4; Chapter 11 sections 11.2.2-11.2.6
claim_scope: Exact reference examples distinguishing causative constructions, resultative compounds, resultative/extent complements, inverted resultatives, resultative passives, and overt aspect markers including perfective 咗.
important_limit: The curated supplement illustrates recognized structures but does not validate the runtime’s bespoke 整冧咗, 變咗做, 解決咗, 熟咗, 停咗雨, or six-slot 好似 wrapper labels, nor unrestricted lexical cross-products.

citation: Luke, K. K. and O. T. Nancarrow. 1998. Auxiliary Verbs in Cantonese. In Stephen Matthews (ed.), Studies in Cantonese Linguistics. Hong Kong: Linguistic Society of Hong Kong.
publication_type: corpus-based grammatical study in a scholarly edited volume; full-volume scan hosted by the Linguistic Society of Hong Kong
verified_locator: chapter printed pp. 81-98 (PDF pp. 87-104), especially examples (1)-(16), sections 2-3, examples (41)-(55), and corpus table (57)
claim_scope: Position and scope of Cantonese auxiliaries; inability of core auxiliaries to take NP objects or stand alone except ellipsis; core/non-core distinction; lexical inventories and meanings; main-verb/auxiliary contrasts for 想, 要, and 鍾意; suppletive 要 negation; corpus frequencies in a 22,426-word running text.
important_limit: The word-class analysis, speaker judgments, and one running-text corpus do not prove unrestricted productivity, exhaustive modern distribution, universal acceptability, or Canto Span node boundaries. Core/non-core is evidence for heterogeneity, not a required learner ontology.

citation: Yeung, Ka-Wai. 2006. On the Status of the Complementizer WAA6 in Cantonese. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics 4(1):1-48.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official open-access abstract and bibliographic record
verified_locator: official abstract; Vol. 4(1), pp. 1-48; distinctions waa6_1, waa6_2, and waa6_3
claim_scope: Distinct lexical and functional uses of 話: speech verb “say,” transitive blame/condemn verb, and proposed clause-selecting complementizer after saying or cognition predicates; formal differences in aspect and argument selection.
important_limit: Only the official abstract was accessible in this pass. It supports the stated distinctions and the author’s proposal, not every detailed test or universal acceptance of the complementizer analysis.

citation: Matthews, Stephen. 2021. Some unresolved problems in Cantonese grammar. Seminar paper, Lund Circle of East Asian Linguistics, 18 October 2021.
publication_type: scholarly conference/seminar paper; official university repository abstract
verified_locator: official abstract, lines discussing 話; example 佢同我講話冇錢喎
claim_scope: The synchronic analysis of 話 as a complementizer or semi-complementizer is unresolved; the cited surface sequence after 講 is real, but CP analysis conflicts with other proposals and may require an alternative.
important_limit: A seminar abstract identifies a theoretical problem and one example; it does not provide a complete alternative grammar or reject every complementizer analysis.

citation: Yap, Foong Ha, Tak-sum Wong, and Winnie Oi-wan Chor. 2014. Clause-medial particles and stance marking in Cantonese.
publication_type: scholarly conference presentation; institutional-repository full slide deck
verified_locator: slides 4, 28-33, and 37; especially lexical/stance continuum for 唔知 and hearsay/complementizer-like 話 examples
claim_scope: Complement-taking predicates may be reanalyzed as stance adverbials/parentheticals; 唔知 ranges from lexical “not know” through doubt to negative-attitude marking; subjectful and subjectless 知-complement examples; lexical and complementizer-like/hearsay uses of 話.
important_limit: This is a presentation synthesizing corpus and historical work. Its grammaticalization pathways and stance categories do not by themselves license a parser-wide productive template or settle every synchronic constituent analysis.

citation: Lui, Pun Ho. 2025. Reported Thought in Cantonese. Asian Languages and Linguistics, accepted preprint.
publication_type: accepted scholarly article preprint; author full text
verified_locator: abstract and sections 1, 3, and 5; pp. 1 onward; examples with 心諗 and comparison with 話 reported speech
claim_scope: Reported-thought 心諗 construction with overt or contextually implicit thought complements; structural distinction between reported thought and reported speech with 話; direct/indirect thought and complement variability.
important_limit: The paper focuses on 心諗 and written/conversational reported thought. It does not establish a general cognition predicate cross-product or make reported thought and ordinary belief complements interchangeable.

citation: Lam, Olivia S.-C., and Adams B. Bodomo. 2003. Modeling Verb Order in Complex Multi-Verbal Predicate Constructions. Proceedings of PACLIC 17, 328-338.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official ACL Anthology full text and metadata
verified_locator: pp. 328-333; especially example (1), repeated as (12), VP decomposition in (13), and ordering contrasts in (14)-(15)
claim_scope: Broad Cantonese serial-verb definition; exact progressive first VP + 嚟 + purpose VP example; explicit three-VP decomposition; evidence that possible VP orders are constrained rather than freely permutable
important_limit: The Optimality-Theoretic account and its focus/order constraints are theory-specific. One example does not validate the runtime’s exact 喺度 + progressive + unlinked purpose template or arbitrary multiverb cross-products

citation: Cheng, Lisa Lai-Shen. 2022. Response particles hai6 in Cantonese. Journal of Chinese Linguistics 50(2): 532-544.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official publisher preview and metadata
verified_locator: pp. 532-533; examples (1)-(2); publisher abstract on preview p. 3
claim_scope: 係 hai6 as a positive response particle with negative counterpart 唔係; responses to polar questions and to non-interrogative speech acts; exact 係啊 response tokens.
important_limit: Only the publisher preview and abstract were inspected. The article does not validate every runtime particle variant, every response environment, repetition template, or a unified FormulaDiscourseUnit node.

citation: Li, Boya. 2006. Chinese Final Particles and the Syntax of the Periphery. PhD dissertation, Leiden University. LOT 133.
publication_type: doctoral dissertation; publisher-hosted full text
verified_locator: printed pp. 94-95 (PDF pp. 105-106), examples (51)-(55), especially example (54); printed p. 117 (PDF p. 118)
claim_scope: Cantonese final particle 呢 ne1 in declaratives, wh-questions, alternative questions, and thematic questions; exact temporal-topic thematic question ting1-jat6 ne1 “how about tomorrow?”; context-sensitive discourse effects of final particles.
important_limit: The dissertation adopts an evaluative-mood/cartographic analysis and cites earlier judgments. It does not directly establish the exact runtime strings 你呢 or bare 呢, nor does it authorize hidden predicate recovery or one universal fragment syntax.

citation: Lee, Tommy Tsz-Ming, and Victor Junnan Pan. 2024. Licensing VP Movement and Ellipsis in Mandarin and Cantonese. Proceedings of the 40th West Coast Conference on Formal Linguistics, 192-201.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official full text
verified_locator: pp. 192-196; examples (1)-(13), especially Cantonese examples (3), (5)-(9), and Table 1
claim_scope: Selective licensing of Cantonese VP movement and ellipsis; modal/auxiliary heads versus adverbs; licensing by 有/冇/未; failure of progressive 喺度 and some aspectual verbs to license ellipsis; lexical and use-specific contrasts.
important_limit: The phase-based analysis is theory-specific and many examples concern movement or right dislocation rather than dialogue answers. It supports selective licensing, not unrestricted bare-modal answers, silent structure insertion, or the runtime’s complete FragmentAnswer inventory.

citation: Huang, Yu-hsin, One-soon Her, and Stano Kong. 2025. Revisiting the Taxonomy of Interrogatives in Cantonese. Tsing Hua Journal of Chinese Studies 55(1): 157-195.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; author-hosted full text and journal metadata
verified_locator: pp. 166-168, especially example (5) and discussion; article pp. 157-195
claim_scope: Polarity-based response behavior in Cantonese polar questions; exact 係啊/啱嘅 confirmation and 唔係啊/唔啱 disconfirmation responses to a negative polar question.
important_limit: The article advances a revised interrogative taxonomy and relies on author judgments. Its polarity diagnostics do not cover information-question answers, all response particles, formulaic repetitions, or Canto Span node boundaries.

citation: Kwong, Oi Yee. 2018. The Non-deictic Use of Demonstratives in Conversations and Interpreted Speeches in Contemporary Hong Kong Cantonese. Proceedings of PACLIC 32, 313-321.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official ACL Anthology full text
verified_locator: pp. 313-315; especially example (3) on p. 314
claim_scope: Corpus-attested discourse sequence containing 呢 + 就係 + demonstrative nominal material; non-deictic and discourse-management uses of Cantonese demonstratives across speech registers.
important_limit: The corpus example is a full discourse sequence, not an isolated identification answer. It does not validate the runtime template identification marker + arbitrary NP + optional particle.

citation: Tang, Sze-Wing. 2015. A generalized syntactic schema for utterance particles in Chinese. Lingua Sinica 1:3.
publication_type: peer-reviewed open-access journal article
verified_locator: endnote g; article lines corresponding to note on Cantonese 就係啦, bare *就係, and 係啦
claim_scope: Particle-bound utterance use of Cantonese 就係啦; contrast with unattested bare 就係 in that utterance-particle use and availability of 係啦.
important_limit: The article advances a theory-specific syntax of utterance particles. Its starred bare form concerns a particular utterance-particle interpretation, not every copular or focus use of 就係.

citation: Tam, Wing Yu (譚詠瑜). 2021. 香港粵語利益性接收標記「多謝」的話語功能及其語法浮現 [The emergence of a beneficial reception marker: The discourse-pragmatic functions of doze in Hong Kong Cantonese]. Tsing Hua Journal of Chinese Studies 51(3): 539-585.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; corpus-based discourse study
verified_locator: pp. 557-558, example (21), especially 幾錢呀 / 五毫子; p. 556 example (20), 係一百蚊嚟㗎
claim_scope: Corpus-attested exact bare price question 幾錢呀 and amount answer 五毫子 in a historical-film exchange; separate corpus example with overt 係 before a price amount.
important_limit: The article studies the discourse functions of 多謝, not price syntax. The price exchanges are incidental corpus attestations and do not establish productivity, modern frequency, optional slots around 幾錢, or a unified scalar-question construction.

citation: Chow, Bun-Ching. 2007. Cantonese for Everyone (Jyutping version) / 大家嘅廣東話. Hong Kong: The Commercial Press. ISBN 978-962-07-1824-3.
publication_type: pedagogical Cantonese coursebook
verified_locator: user-provided scan, PDF pp. 17-21 and 46-50, 54-59; especially printed pp. 23-25 useful/classroom expressions including 唔該講大聲啲, 唔該講慢啲, and other polite directives; inherited locators; bibliographic metadata
claim_scope: Exact pedagogical forms for lexical interaction formulae, polite directives with 唔該, degree/manner 啲, possession, self-introduction, naming, titles, destinations, and whereabouts clauses.
important_limit: Beginner coursebook evidence supplies contextualized forms and teaching templates, not corpus frequency, a general imperative syntax, unrestricted modifier productivity, universal judgments, or parser nodes.

citation: 鄭定歐、張勵妍、高石英. 2021. 粵語（香港話）教程（修訂版）（錄音掃碼即聽版）. 香港: 三聯書店.
publication_type: advanced pedagogical reference coursebook
verified_locator: user-provided searchable PDF; R30 exact locators: PDF pp. 39, 80, 90, 92, 95, 106, 154-155, 189, 205, 214, 243, 256, 270, 296, and 391; including 唔-negation, 未睇完, VP+都得/free-choice 都得, 你覺得佢哋點樣, alternative cognition questions, and 你想約佢幾時; inherited page-level locators; official publisher metadata; R31 extensions: printed p. 215 你諗下係唔係 and glossary printed p. 388 諗住 “想着；以為”
claim_scope: Exact Hong Kong Cantonese pedagogical evidence for ordinary 唔 negation, 未 plus completion, postposed 都得 acceptability and free-choice uses, cognition predicates with multiple question-complement types, and scheduling/time questions, plus inherited quantity, scalar, directive, conditional, aspect, locative, manner, weather, naming, discourse, and change-predicate examples. R31 adds exact cognition+下 with a polar-clausal complement and explicit lexical polysemy for 諗住.
important_limit: A Mandarin-oriented coursebook supplies contextualized exact forms and teaching explanations. It does not establish corpus frequency, a cognition-only delimitative construction, a uniform object analysis after 諗下, productive speech-effect templates, or a single intention-frame ontology.

citation: Cheung, Samuel Hung-nin. 1990. Terms of Address in Cantonese. Journal of Chinese Linguistics 18(1): 1-43.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article
verified_locator: official journal issue metadata and abstract-level records; article pp. 1-43
claim_scope: Hong Kong Cantonese address terms as vocatives/designatives, including kinship and social-address systems and their discourse/social functions.
important_limit: The full article text was not inspected in R20. Abstract and metadata support the existence and heterogeneity of the address system, not the runtime’s exact prefix/name/suffix templates or unrestricted combinations.

citation: Lam, Charles. 2013. Reduplication across Categories in Cantonese. Proceedings of PACLIC 27, 277-286.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official ACL Anthology full text
verified_locator: pp. 277-282; especially examples (5), (16), and (22), and section 5.2
claim_scope: Cantonese verbal reduplication; V-V-吓 examples; durative versus iterative readings conditioned by the aspectual class/aktionsart of the base predicate; atelic reading versus punctual repeated-event reading.
important_limit: The paper advances a formal summation/cumulativity analysis from a small judgment inventory. It does not license every action verb, the exact standalone 食食 runtime item, one uniform light/checking gloss, or omission/insertion of overt 一 or 下/吓.

citation: Chor, Winnie. 2013. From 'direction' to 'positive evaluation': On the grammaticalization, subjectification and intersubjectification of faan1 'return' in Cantonese. Language and Linguistics 14(1): 91-134.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official publisher full text and university metadata
verified_locator: journal pp. 104-108; section 4.1 examples (13)-(23), section 4.2 examples (24)-(30), and footnote 12
claim_scope: Directional 返, extended redoing/resumption/reciprocation meanings, restoration to a prior functional state, contemporary again/resumption examples, and distinct subjective/evaluative and interpersonal uses of postverbal 返 with overt objects.
important_limit: The article is diachronic and functional and documents polysemy rather than a deterministic parser rule. Surface V返NP alone does not identify repetition, restoration, evaluation, politeness, or direction, and the paper does not validate the runtime lexical-class fallback.

citation: Independent Learning Centre, The Chinese University of Hong Kong. Cantonese Express / 港式粵語速遞, Daily Conversation 9: 病咗睇醫生, contrast exercises.
publication_type: official university-hosted pedagogical Cantonese resource
verified_locator: section 6, 返 faan1（表示回復現狀）; items 整返好部電腦, 執返好間房, 你好返未呀, and contrast set on returning to a prior state; section 4 問吓佢嘅意見
claim_scope: Exact contemporary teaching examples for V-吓, restorative V返好 with an overt object, adjectival 好返, and return/recovery contrasts after a prior changed state.
important_limit: This is a learner resource, not a corpus or construction study. It attests exact forms and an explicit pedagogical meaning contrast but does not establish frequency, exhaustive lexical selection, argument optionality, or a parser node.

citation: Lui, Wilson. 2020. Locative Inversion in Cantonese. In Miriam Butt and Ida Toivonen (eds.), Proceedings of the LFG’20 Conference, 250-267. Stanford: CSLI Publications.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official Stanford CSLI full text
verified_locator: pp. 251-256 and 261-263; especially five location strategies, examples (1)-(5), the 1.58% elicitation result, definition of [localiser + verb + NP], and examples (13)-(15)
claim_scope: Five empirically reported strategies for expressing location in Cantonese; exact locative-inversion example 牆上面擺咗部電話; separation from copular, postural, resultative, and existential strategies; rarity in elicited responses; localiser-verb-theme order; and observed perfective 咗 requirement in the analyzed inversion data.
important_limit: The paper uses a small elicited dataset inherited from Ng 2015 and proposes an LFG/LMT analysis. Locative subjecthood, localiser category boundaries, verb restrictions, and aspect analysis are contested or unresolved; the 1.58% rate is task-specific and does not define parser acceptance.

citation: Tsuno, Kaho. 2021. Cantonese: “Passive expression”, “Transitivity” [広東語：「ヴォイスとその周辺」「他動性」]. Journal of the Institute of Language Research 26: 201-215.
publication_type: peer-reviewed/institutional journal questionnaire report; official Tokyo University of Foreign Studies full text
verified_locator: pp. 201-215; especially printed p. 207, item 37: 落雨喇, with segmentation and Jyutping
claim_scope: Exact overt Cantonese weather-event utterance 落雨喇 in a cross-linguistic voice/transitivity questionnaire, plus author-provided segmentation and romanization.
important_limit: The paper is a translation/questionnaire report rather than a focused study of weather predicates or subjectlessness. One exact item attests the surface form but does not establish a general environmental-clause class, frequency, argument structure, or expletive analysis.

citation: Francis, Elaine J. and Stephen Matthews. 2006. Categoriality and Object Extraction in Cantonese Serial Verb Constructions. Natural Language & Linguistic Theory 24(3): 751-801.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official institutional abstract and metadata
verified_locator: HKU Scholars Hub official abstract and metadata; journal pp. 751-801; abstract findings on coverb category, object extraction, and aspect marking
claim_scope: Cantonese coverb constructions as serial-verb-like structures whose first verb has preposition-like meaning/function; experimentally reported extraction contrast; verbal morphosyntax/aspect marking; and explicit category-analysis dispute.
important_limit: Abstract-level claim verification only; full example inventory and diagnostics were not recovered in this batch. The authors’ verbal/adjunct-island analysis is a proposal, not a parser ontology, marker inventory, or proof of every runtime subtype.

citation: Zhang, Hongnian 張洪年. 1970. 粵語中常見的謂詞詞尾. 中國文化研究所學報 3(2):459-488.
publication_type: academic journal article; official Chinese University of Hong Kong archive full text
verified_locator: pp. 459-468, especially pp. 462-468; sections on aspect, perfective 咗, questions with 有冇/未, and experiential 過; examples 佢嚟咗喇, 佢去咗喇, 你飲過茶未, and 有冇食過唐餐
claim_scope: Early systematic description of Cantonese predicate suffixes; completion/perfective 咗 including motion verbs; aspectual question strategies; experiential 過 as prior-experience marking distinct from 咗; and ordering/co-occurrence observations.
important_limit: A 1970 descriptive account using historical orthography and romanization. It does not establish exact modern runtime nodes, unrestricted lexical productivity, the exact 入咗嚟/落咗去 strings, universal judgments, or a complete contemporary negation-aspect system.

citation: Iida, Maki. 2009. The Conditional Marker “ge3” in Cantonese [粵語的條件分句標記“嘅”]. Media and Communication Studies 57:21-33.
publication_type: departmental bulletin research article
verified_locator: CiNii official metadata and Chinese abstract; journal pp. 21-33; published 2009-11-09
claim_scope: Grammaticalization of structural/nominalizing 嘅 into a conditional-clause marker; reanalysis of VP/AP嘅 topic/generic structures; explicit contrast between bare conditional 嘅 and 嘅話, with bare 嘅 retaining stronger generic or law-like constraints.
important_limit: Abstract-level verification only. Do not attribute uninspected examples or detailed syntactic diagnostics, and do not treat the proposed grammaticalization path or genericity analysis as the only possible account.

citation: Cheng, Siu-Pong. 2023. Cantonese Sentence-final Particles Pertaining to the TP Domain. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 102(1):81-100.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article
verified_locator: pp. 90-92, examples 12-16 and footnote 10; pp. 96-97, example 28 and ordering discussion
claim_scope: Exact (如果)我去嘅話我哋會見 conditional; clause-initial 如果 may co-occur with clause-final 嘅話; postposed conditional clauses; author/informant tone observations for 話6 versus 話2; ordering of assertive 嘅 before conditional 嘅話.
important_limit: The split-TP and possible-world account is theory-specific. The indicative/counterfactual tone tendency is explicitly limited to the author and some informants, and the paper says the initial-versus-final conditional distinction remains unresolved.

citation: Yip, Virginia, and Stephen Matthews. 2000. Syntactic transfer in a Cantonese–English bilingual child. Bilingualism: Language and Cognition 3(3):193-208. DOI: 10.1017/S136672890000033X.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal research article; full author/repository PDF and official publisher metadata
verified_locator: article pp. 195-196, example (5), null-object discussion; p. 201, examples (35), (38)-(39), and discussion; official Cambridge metadata
claim_scope: Adult Cantonese allows discourse-recoverable null objects; exact 我鍾意 utterance with an omitted object; exact existential 仲有 with an understood domain; exact 放(喺)呢度 and 要買 with omitted objects; relation between discourse topics and later null arguments.
important_limit: The paper is principally a bilingual-child transfer study and adopts a null-topic analysis. Adult Cantonese examples and descriptive recoverability conditions may be used, but child frequencies, transfer analysis, silent-topic ontology, and unrestricted omission must not be imported into Canto Span.

citation: Zhou, Yang. 2018. Exploring the emergence of the postverbal sin1 先 in Cantonese. Language and Linguistics 19(2):333-375. DOI: 10.1075/lali.00012.zho.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal research article; official publisher abstract and accessible full-text copy
verified_locator: official abstract; article pp. 333-375; especially abstract and introduction on contemporary postverbal sin1, multiple meanings, and the precedent-subsequent contrast
claim_scope: Contemporary Cantonese sin1 has multiple grammatical and pragmatic meanings; its prominent priority meaning occurs postverbally; historical emergence and differentiation of precedent/subsequent meanings.
important_limit: The paper is primarily diachronic and areal. It does not establish Canto Span node boundaries, a free action-VP cross-product, or that every V+先+particle sequence expresses simple priority.

citation: Lai, Ryan Ka Yau, and Michelle Man-Long Pang. 2023. Rethinking the Description and Typology of Cantonese Causative–Resultative Constructions: A Dynamic Constructionist Lens. Languages 8(2):151. DOI: 10.3390/languages8020151.
publication_type: peer-reviewed open-access journal research article
verified_locator: official full text and abstract; especially abstract and sections defining CRCs, constructional schema, syntactic/semantic subtypes, and holistic versus decompositional argument structure
claim_scope: Cantonese causative–resultative constructions contain two verbal elements oriented to cause and effect; the paper proposes a construction-level schema with several subtypes and argues that CRC arguments belong to the whole construction rather than being mechanically composed from each verb’s valency.
important_limit: The authors’ dynamic-constructionist analysis is one theoretical account. It supports a genuine CRC family and warns against naive decomposition, but does not validate the exact runtime 整冧咗 template, its object inventory, productivity, or Canto Span frame/predicate node split.

citation: Kędzior, Adrian. 2023. Verbal Morphological Category of Aspect in the Cantonese Language. Linguistica Silesiana 44(1):47-71. DOI: 10.24425/linsi.2023.144823.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal research article with corpus examples
verified_locator: pp. 47-53 and 61-63; especially example (34) 我諗住返屋企 and discussion of lexically shifted 諗住; corpus methodology and aspect inventory
claim_scope: Separates morphological aspect from lexical/periphrastic material; discusses resultative compounds and perfective 咗; identifies a small lexically restricted class where V住 changes meaning, directly illustrating 諗住 as intend/plan.
important_limit: The paper is introductory and mostly uses a written web corpus. Its treatment of 諗住 cites Matthews and Yip and does not establish a productive intention-predicate class, every complement type, or Canto Span frame boundaries.

citation: Lam, Charles. 2014. A Unified Analysis to Surpass Comparative and Experiential Aspect. Proceedings of PACLIC 28, 368-377.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference paper in official ACL Anthology full text
verified_locator: pp. 368-376; especially examples (2), (30)-(32), and section 7 on bare comparatives
claim_scope: Cantonese surpass comparative with 過; property- and event-denoting predicates; bare comparative/property difference with post-predicate (一)啲; analysis of 啲 as a measure phrase rather than the surpass-comparative marker.
important_limit: The paper advances a formal cross-categorial analysis and does not provide a general grammar of every Adj+啲 use. Its bare-comparative examples do not license every property predicate, action modifier, discourse function, or Canto Span node.

citation: Yip, Virginia, and Stephen Matthews. 2017. Intermediate Cantonese: A Grammar and Workbook. 2nd ed. Routledge.
publication_type: pedagogical reference grammar by specialist linguists; exact text verified in an accessible full-text transcription and metadata verified on the official publisher page
verified_locator: Unit 11, section “Verbs of communication”, printed pp. 68-69; exact 我唔話你知 and explanation that communication acts may combine 講/話 with 聽/知 to encode the effect on the hearer; official Routledge metadata
claim_scope: Exact attestation and pedagogical analysis of communication sequences with two verbs, including 話 + recipient + 知, as well as broader serial-verb combination guidance.
important_limit: A pedagogical grammar and mirror-transcribed exact text do not establish corpus frequency, unrestricted speech-verb × recipient × cognition-verb productivity, a canonical ditransitive analysis, or a dedicated Canto Span clause wrapper.
